CustomField.description: Formula field: calendar days elapsed from nepa_start_date__c to today (or nepa_completion_date__c if the process is complete). Used by NEPA_OFD_Variance_Alert to compare against nepa_ofd_target_days__c for FAST-41 FPISC reporting.
CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISBLANK(nepa_completion_date__c)), nepa_completion_date__c - nepa_start_date__c, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(nepa_start_date__c)), TODAY() - nepa_start_date__c, 0 ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Calendar days elapsed from application receipt to today (or completion date). Used for OFD variance monitoring.
CustomField.label: Days Elapsed
